description_long: This is a triangular road warning sign with a red border and a black interior featuring a graphic of falling rocks, indicating a hazard ahead. The sign is mounted on a slender, metallic post that extends vertically from the base of the triangle. The front face of the sign is highly visible, with a bold red outline and a clear pictogram, designed to attract the attention of drivers and pedestrians. The back of the sign is plain and metallic, lacking any markings or graphics. The post appears to be made of galvanized steel, providing durability and resistance to weather conditions. The overall construction is typical for roadside warning signs, intended for temporary or permanent installation in urban or roadside environments.
description: A triangular road warning sign with a red border and falling rocks graphic, mounted on a metallic post. The front is highly visible, while the back is plain and metallic.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing only the thin metallic post and the edge of the triangular sign.
description_view_1: The front view displays the triangular sign with a red border and a falling rocks graphic on a black background.
description_view_2: Another narrow side view, similar to view 0, showing the thin profile of the post and sign.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a plain, metallic triangular surface with no graphics or text.
